soft_skills.fr: Animer le travail d'équipe, collaborer en interdisciplinarité, exercer le leadership, assurer la médiation scientifique
soft_skills.en: Demonstrated teamwork, interdisciplinary collaboration, leadership, and science mediation

soft_skills.fr: Communiquer efficacement, assurer le service client, gérer des projets, organiser des tâches, optimiser la gestion du temps
soft_skills.en: Communicated effectively, provided customer service orientation, managed projects, organized tasks, and managed time efficiently

soft_skills.fr: Analyser, résoudre des situations complexes, faire preuve de créativité, manifester une curiosité scientifique, s'adapter, travailler en autonomie, maintenir la rigueur, prendre des initiatives
soft_skills.en: Applied analytical thinking, solved problems, demonstrated creativity, showed scientific curiosity, adapted to new situations, worked autonomously, maintained rigor, and took initiative

hard_skills.fr: Python, C++, Scala, SQL, LaTeX, Shell scripting, Git/GitHub
hard_skills.en: Developed in Python, C++, Scala, SQL, LaTeX; automated with shell scripting; versioned with Git/GitHub

hard_skills.fr: FastAPI, Streamlit, Node.js/Express, React, Web development, Docker, Docker Compose
hard_skills.en: Built APIs and apps with FastAPI, Streamlit, Node.js/Express, React; developed web solutions; containerized with Docker and Docker Compose

hard_skills.fr: Machine Learning, Data science, Statistiques, Modélisation, Simulation, Optimisation, Power BI
hard_skills.en: Applied machine learning, performed data analysis, used statistics, built mathematical models, ran simulations, optimized portfolios, visualized data, and leveraged Power BI

hard_skills.fr: API REST, Pybind11, Elasticsearch, MongoDB, Prometheus/Grafana, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), PostgreSQL, SBT/Scala, Solidity (Ethereum), Web3.js
hard_skills.en: Designed REST APIs, integrated Pybind11, implemented Elasticsearch and MongoDB, monitored with Prometheus/Grafana, automated CI/CD (GitHub Actions), managed PostgreSQL, used SBT/Scala, developed smart contracts (Solidity, Web3.js)
